questions.question: CCTV ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Central Control Television

questions.explanation: CCTV ka full form Closed-Circuit Television hota hai, jo ek private video system hai.

questions.question: CCTV system ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Security aur surveillance karna

questions.explanation: CCTV system ka mukhya uddeshya security aur surveillance provide karna hai, jisse areas ko monitor kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Ek CCTV operator ki mukhya zimmedari kya hai?

options.B: CCTV monitors par nazar rakhna aur incidents report karna

questions.explanation: CCTV operator ka primary role monitors ko continuously observe karna aur kisi bhi suspicious activity ya incident ko report karna hai.

questions.question: Security ke liye CCTV kahan sabse zyada use hota hai?

options.B: Private homes only

questions.explanation: CCTV ka upyog public places, banks, malls, hospitals aur offices jaise jagahon par security ke liye sabse zyada hota hai.

questions.question: Ek CCTV operator ke liye kaun si quality sabse important hai?

options.B: Sharp observation skills

questions.explanation: Ek CCTV operator ko sharp observation skills ki zaroorat hoti hai taaki woh screens par hone wali choti se choti activity ko bhi notice kar sake.

questions.question: CCTV footage ko kiske liye evidence ke roop mein use kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Criminal investigations

questions.explanation: CCTV footage ko criminal investigations aur court proceedings mein important evidence ke roop mein use kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Surveillance ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kisi ko chupke se dekhna ya monitor karna
options.B: Kisi ke saath baat karna

questions.explanation: Surveillance ka matlab hai kisi area ya person ko continuous monitor karna, aksar security reasons ke liye.

questions.question: Ek CCTV operator ko apni shift mein kya avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Screen par dhyan dena

questions.explanation: CCTV operator ko apni shift ke dauran personal phone use aur kisi bhi tarah ke distraction se bachna chahiye taaki woh apne kaam par focus kar sake.

questions.question: CCTV monitoring mein 'situational awareness' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Aas-paas ke mahol ko samajhna aur potential threats ko pehchanna
options.C: Sirf ek screen par focus karna

questions.explanation: Situational awareness ka matlab hai aas-paas ke mahol ko achhe se samajhna aur potential threats ya unusual activities ko pehchanne ki kshamta.

questions.question: CCTV footage ki confidentiality maintain karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Taaki koi bhi use dekh sake
options.B: Individuals ki privacy protect karne aur misuse rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Footage ki confidentiality maintain karna zaroori hai taaki individuals ki privacy protect ho aur footage ka koi misuse na ho.

questions.question: Ek effective CCTV monitoring system mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Cameras, recording device, monitors aur trained operator

questions.explanation: Ek effective CCTV system mein high-quality cameras, ek reliable recording device (DVR/NVR), clear monitors aur ek trained operator shamil hote hain.

questions.question: CCTV operator ke liye communication skills kyon important hain?

options.B: Incidents ko sahi tarike se report karne aur emergency services se coordinate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Achhi communication skills zaroori hain taaki operator incidents ko clear aur concise tarike se report kar sake aur emergency services se effectively coordinate kar sake.

questions.question: Kisi suspicious activity ko dekhte hi CCTV operator ka first action kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Turant apne supervisor ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi suspicious activity ko dekhte hi, operator ko turant apne supervisor ya control room manager ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: CCTV operator ko kis tarah ki information ko confidential rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Monitoring ke dauran mili sabhi sensitive information

questions.explanation: Operator ko monitoring ke dauran mili sabhi sensitive information, jaise footage details, incident reports, aur personal data ko confidential rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek CCTV operator ko 'blind spots' ke baare mein pata hona kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Taaki wahan cameras na lagaye jayein
options.B: Ye areas hain jahan cameras ki reach nahi hoti aur criminal activity ho sakti hai
options.C: Ye sirf aesthetic purpose ke liye hote hain
options.D: Ye lighting ke liye hote hain

questions.explanation: Blind spots woh areas hote hain jahan cameras ki reach nahi hoti aur criminals in spots ka fayda utha sakte hain, isliye inki jaankari hona zaroori hai.

questions.question: CCTV monitoring mein data privacy laws ka palan karna kyon important hai?

options.A: Ye sirf guidelines hain, compulsory nahi
options.B: Individuals ke rights protect karne aur legal issues se bachne ke liye
options.C: Isse system slow ho jata hai

questions.explanation: Data privacy laws ka palan karna zaroori hai taaki individuals ke rights protect hon aur organization ko legal repercussions se bachaya ja sake.

questions.question: CCTV operator ke liye physical aur mental alertness kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Lambe samay tak focus maintain karne aur critical situations mein quick response dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Physical aur mental alertness zaroori hai taaki operator lambe samay tak focus maintain kar sake aur critical situations mein turant aur sahi action le sake.

questions.question: Ek typical CCTV system mein kaun se main components hote hain?

options.B: Cameras, DVR/NVR, Monitors, Cables

questions.explanation: CCTV system ke main components mein cameras (jo video capture karte hain), DVR/NVR (jo video record karte hain), monitors (jo video display karte hain) aur cables (jo components ko connect karte hain) shamil hote hain.

questions.question: DVR ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Data Video Reader

questions.explanation: DVR ka full form Digital Video Recorder hai, jo analog CCTV cameras se video footage record karta hai.

questions.question: IP camera ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Image Processing camera

questions.explanation: IP camera ka matlab Internet Protocol camera hai, jo network par data transmit karta hai.

questions.question: Analog cameras ko record karne ke liye kis device ki zaroorat hoti hai?

options.B: DVR

questions.explanation: Analog cameras se aane wale video signals ko record karne ke liye Digital Video Recorder (DVR) ka upyog hota hai.

questions.question: NVR ka full form kya hai?

options.B: New Video Relay

questions.explanation: NVR ka full form Network Video Recorder hai, jo IP cameras se aane wale digital video streams ko record karta hai.

questions.question: Kis type ka camera 360-degree rotation, tilt aur zoom kar sakta hai?

options.B: Dome camera

questions.explanation: PTZ ka matlab Pan-Tilt-Zoom hai, aur ye cameras remote control se horizontally (pan), vertically (tilt) aur zoom adjust kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Infrared (IR) functionality kyon important hai CCTV cameras mein?

options.A: Din mein colour footage ke liye
options.B: Raat mein ya kam roshni mein dekhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Infrared (IR) LEDs cameras ko raat mein ya bahut kam roshni wali jagahon par bhi clear black & white footage capture karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: CCTV system mein 'resolution' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Image ki clarity aur detail

questions.explanation: Resolution image ki clarity aur detail ko refer karta hai. Higher resolution ka matlab hai zyada clear aur detailed image.

questions.question: Dome camera typically kis liye use hota hai?

options.B: Indoor discreet surveillance ke liye

questions.explanation: Dome cameras apni discreet design aur vandalism-resistant casing ke karan indoor settings mein, jaise shops aur offices, mein discreet surveillance ke liye ideal hote hain.

questions.question: Power over Ethernet (PoE) ka kya fayda hai IP cameras mein?

options.A: Isse camera ko zyada power chahiye
options.B: Ek single Ethernet cable se data aur power dono mil jate hain
options.C: Isse camera wireless ho jata hai
options.D: Isse camera ka size kam ho jata hai

questions.explanation: PoE technology ek single Ethernet cable ke through IP cameras ko data connectivity aur electrical power dono provide karti hai, jisse installation simple ho jati hai.

questions.question: Wireless CCTV camera ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Easy installation aur flexibility

questions.explanation: Wireless cameras ko cables ki zaroorat nahi hoti, jisse installation easy ho jaati hai aur unhe flexible tarike se kahin bhi install kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Kis type ki cable analog CCTV cameras ko DVR se connect karti hai?

options.B: HDMI cable

questions.explanation: Coaxial cables (jaise RG59) typically analog CCTV cameras se video signals ko DVR tak transmit karne ke liye use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: CCTV footage store karne ke liye sabse common storage medium kya hai?

options.B: Hard Disk Drive (HDD)

questions.explanation: Hard Disk Drives (HDDs) DVRs aur NVRs mein footage ko store karne ke liye sabse common aur cost-effective storage medium hain.

questions.question: Outdoor cameras mein kis feature ka hona zaroori hai?

options.B: Bluetooth connectivity

questions.explanation: Outdoor cameras ko weather conditions jaise baarish, dhool, aur extreme temperatures se bachane ke liye weatherproofing (IP rating) ka hona zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hybrid DVR (HDVR) kya hota hai?

options.A: Sirf analog cameras support karta hai
options.B: Sirf IP cameras support karta hai
options.C: Analog aur IP dono tarah ke cameras support karta hai
options.D: Sirf wireless cameras support karta hai

questions.explanation: HDVR (Hybrid Digital Video Recorder) ek aisa device hai jo analog cameras aur IP cameras dono se footage ko record aur manage kar sakta hai.

questions.question: CCTV system mein 'frame rate' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek second mein capture kiye gaye images ki sankhya
options.B: Camera ka physical size

questions.explanation: Frame rate (frames per second ya FPS) ek second mein capture kiye gaye individual images ki sankhya ko darshata hai. Higher FPS ka matlab smoother video.

questions.question: Ek CCTV monitor ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: CCTV cameras se live aur recorded video footage display karna

questions.explanation: CCTV monitor ka primary function cameras se aane wale live aur recorded video footage ko operator ko display karna hai.

questions.question: CCTV monitoring ke dauran 'multi-screen viewing' ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Ek hi screen par sabhi cameras ko ek saath dekhna
options.B: Sirf ek camera ko dekhna

questions.explanation: Multi-screen viewing se operator ek hi samay mein kai cameras ke feeds ko ek saath monitor kar sakta hai, jisse bade areas ko cover karna aasan ho jata hai.

questions.question: PTZ camera ko control karne ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Mouse, joystick ya control panel

questions.explanation: PTZ cameras ko typically software interface ke through mouse, dedicated joystick ya control panel ka upyog karke control kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Camera ke 'zoom' function ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Image ko bada karna ya chhota karna taaki details dekhi ja sakein

questions.explanation: Zoom function se operator image ko bada (zoom in) ya chhota (zoom out) kar sakta hai, jisse door ki objects ya specific details ko clear dekha ja sake.

questions.question: CCTV monitoring mein 'pre-set positions' ka kya use hai?

options.A: Camera ko randomly ghumane ke liye
options.B: Camera ko pehle se define kiye gaye locations par turant move karne ke liye
options.C: Camera ko off karne ke liye
options.D: Camera ki recording rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Pre-set positions woh specific locations hoti hain jahan operator ek click par PTZ camera ko turant move kar sakta hai, jisse quick area coverage possible ho.

questions.question: Ek 'tour' function PTZ camera mein kya karta hai?

options.A: Camera ko ek hi jagah par fix rakhta hai
options.B: Camera ko automatically kai pre-set positions ke beech ghumata hai
options.C: Camera ko manual control deta hai
options.D: Camera ki recording rok deta hai

questions.explanation: Tour function PTZ camera ko automatically pre-set positions ke ek sequence mein move karta hai, jisse ek bade area ko bina manual intervention ke monitor kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: CCTV operator ko 'suspicious behavior' kaise identify karna chahiye?

options.A: Jo bhi person screen par dikhe
options.B: Unusual movements, loitering, chupke se dekhna, chehra chhupana
options.D: Jo log baatein kar rahe hon

questions.explanation: Suspicious behavior mein unusual movements, ek hi jagah par der tak rukna (loitering), chupke se aas-paas dekhna ya chehra chhupane ki koshish karna shamil ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Low light conditions mein behtar visibility ke liye kya use kiya jata hai?

options.B: Infrared (IR) night vision

questions.explanation: Infrared (IR) night vision cameras ko kam roshni ya andhere mein bhi objects ko clear dekhne mein help karta hai, aksar black and white footage mein.

questions.question: CCTV footage ko review karte samay 'timestamp' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Incident ke exact date aur time ko verify karne ke liye
options.C: Video ki quality improve karne ke liye
options.D: Video ko delete karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Timestamp har frame par date aur time dikhata hai, jo kisi incident ke exact samay ko verify karne aur evidence ki authenticity ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek CCTV operator ki visual acuity kitni honi chahiye?

options.B: Excellent eyesight

questions.explanation: CCTV monitoring ke liye excellent visual acuity (achhi nazar) hona zaroori hai taaki screen par choti se choti detail aur movement ko bhi observe kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Kisi specific area par focus karne ke liye operator ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Camera ko zoom in aur pan/tilt karna
options.C: Sabhi cameras ko ek saath dekhna

questions.explanation: Kisi specific area par focus karne ke liye operator ko PTZ camera ko zoom in karna chahiye aur zaroorat padne par pan (horizontal) aur tilt (vertical) bhi karna chahiye.

questions.question: Motion detection alert ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Isse camera off ho jata hai
options.B: Jab camera ke view mein koi movement ho, toh operator ko alert milta hai
options.C: Isse footage delete ho jati hai

questions.explanation: Motion detection system tab alert generate karta hai jab camera ke view mein koi movement detect hoti hai, jisse operator ko turant suspicious activity ka pata chalta hai.

questions.question: Ek CCTV operator ko kitne samay tak continuously screen par focus karna chahiye?

options.B: Apni poori shift ke dauran, breaks ke saath

questions.explanation: CCTV operator ko apni poori shift ke dauran (planned breaks ke saath) screens par continuously focus karna chahiye taaki koi bhi incident miss na ho.

questions.question: Video analytics ka kya role hai modern CCTV systems mein?

options.B: Automated detection of specific events (e.g., line crossing, object left behind)

questions.explanation: Video analytics software footage ko automatically analyze karta hai aur specific events ya patterns ko detect karta hai, jaise line crossing, object left behind, ya abnormal behavior, jisse operator ka workload kam hota hai.

questions.question: Kisi bhi incident ko monitor karte samay, operator ko kya record karna chahiye?

options.B: Time, location, description of event aur involved persons

questions.explanation: Operator ko incident ka exact time, location, event ki detailed description aur involved persons (agar possible ho) ko record karna chahiye.

questions.question: CCTV monitoring mein 'false alarms' ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.A: Har false alarm par panic karna
options.B: Unhe analyze karna aur future mein kam karne ke liye steps lena

questions.explanation: False alarms ko analyze karna chahiye taaki unke causes ko identify kiya ja sake aur system settings ko adjust karke future mein unhe kam kiya ja sake, bina real threats ko miss kiye.

questions.question: Ek operator ko 'panoramic view' ka upyog kab karna chahiye?

options.A: Jab kisi specific person ko track karna ho
options.B: Jab ek bade area ki general surveillance karni ho

questions.explanation: Panoramic view (jo fisheye cameras ya multiple cameras ko stitch karke banta hai) tab useful hota hai jab ek bade area ki general surveillance karni ho, taaki koi bhi corner miss na ho.

questions.question: CCTV operator ke liye multitasking capability kitni important hai?

options.B: Bahut important, kai screens aur tasks ko ek saath handle karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf ek hi task karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Multitasking capability bahut important hai kyunki operator ko ek saath kai screens monitor karne, PTZ controls operate karne, aur incident reports fill karne jaise tasks karne pad sakte hain.

questions.question: Kisi incident ko detect karne ke baad CCTV operator ka pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Incident ko confirm karna aur supervisor ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Incident detect hone par, operator ko pehle uski validity confirm karni chahiye aur turant apne supervisor ya designated authority ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Incident report mein kaun si information shamil honi chahiye?

options.B: Date, time, location, description, involved parties, operator ka naam

questions.explanation: Ek complete incident report mein date, time, exact location, incident ki detailed description, involved parties (agar koi ho), aur report karne wale operator ka naam shamil hona chahiye.

questions.question: Emergency ki situation mein (jaise fire), CCTV operator ki kya zimmedari hai?

options.B: Situation ko monitor karna aur emergency services ko sahi information dena
options.C: Khud fire bujhane ki koshish karna

questions.explanation: Fire jaise emergency mein, operator ko situation ko closely monitor karna chahiye aur emergency services (fire brigade) ko exact location aur situation ke baare mein sahi aur timely information deni chahiye.

questions.question: Kisi medical emergency ko dekhte hi operator ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Medical staff ya emergency services ko turant inform karna

questions.explanation: Medical emergency mein, operator ko turant medical staff ya emergency services ko inform karna chahiye aur situation ko monitor karte rehna chahiye.

questions.question: Evacuation procedure ke dauran CCTV operator ka kya role hai?

options.B: Evacuation routes ko monitor karna aur congested areas ki report karna
options.D: Apni jagah chhod kar chale jana

questions.explanation: Evacuation ke dauran, operator ko evacuation routes ko monitor karna chahiye, dekhna chahiye ki sabhi log safely nikal rahe hain, aur kisi bhi congestion ya blockage ko report karna chahiye.

questions.question: Bomb threat jaise serious incident mein operator ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Control room protocols follow karna aur designated personnel ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Bomb threat jaise serious incident mein, operator ko control room ke established protocols ko follow karna chahiye aur turant designated security personnel ya emergency response team ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Active shooter scenario mein CCTV operator ka kya role hai?

options.B: Police ko live updates dena aur shooter ki location track karna

questions.explanation: Active shooter scenario mein, operator ko police ko shooter ki live location, description, aur movements ki updates deni chahiye, jo response teams ke liye critical information hoti hai.

questions.question: Incident ke baad, footage ko 'preserve' karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Evidence ke roop mein use ke liye aur future reference ke liye
options.C: Storage space fill karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Incident ke baad footage ko preserve karna zaroori hai taaki use investigation mein evidence ke roop mein use kiya ja sake aur future reference ke liye available rahe.

questions.question: CCTV operator ko emergency contact list kahan milni chahiye?

options.B: Control room mein easily accessible jagah par

questions.explanation: Emergency contact list (police, fire, medical, supervisor) control room mein hamesha easily accessible honi chahiye taaki zaroorat padne par turant call kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Kisi theft ke incident mein, operator ko kya details note karni chahiye?

options.A: Chori ki gayi item ka color
options.B: Suspect ka description, time of theft, escape route

questions.explanation: Theft ke incident mein, operator ko suspect ka detailed description (height, clothing, face), theft ka exact time, aur suspect ke escape route ko note karna chahiye.

questions.question: Communication protocol ka palan karna kyon important hai emergency mein?

options.B: Clear aur effective communication ensure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Emergency mein communication protocol ka palan karne se clear aur effective communication ensure hoti hai, galti ki sambhavna kam hoti hai, aur response time improve hota hai.

questions.question: Kisi suspicious package ko dekhte hi operator ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Area ko monitor karna aur security/bomb disposal unit ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Suspicious package ko dekhte hi, operator ko us area ko monitor karna chahiye, kisi ko uske paas jaane se rokna chahiye, aur turant security ya bomb disposal unit ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: CCTV operator ko 'chain of custody' ke baare mein kyon pata hona chahiye?

options.B: Evidence ki integrity maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Isse recording slow ho jati hai

questions.explanation: Chain of custody ka matlab hai evidence ko collect karne, handle karne aur store karne ka documented process. Iski jaankari zaroori hai taaki footage ki legal validity aur integrity maintain rahe.

questions.question: Kisi civil unrest ya mob situation mein operator ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Khud bahar nikal kar shanti banani
options.B: Situation ko monitor karna, crowd movements track karna aur police ko updates dena
options.C: Sabhi cameras ko off kar dena

questions.explanation: Civil unrest mein, operator ko situation ko closely monitor karna chahiye, crowd movements ko track karna chahiye, aur police ko real-time updates deni chahiye taaki woh effective action le sakein.

questions.question: Badi ghatnaon ke liye incident log maintain karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf paper waste karne ke liye
options.B: Detailed record rakhne aur future analysis ke liye
options.D: Sirf supervisor ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Incident log maintain karne se har ghatna ka detailed record rehta hai, jo future analysis, training aur legal purposes ke liye invaluable hota hai.

questions.question: CCTV operator ko 'first responder' ki definition pata honi chahiye, kyon?

options.B: Taaki woh apni role aur responsibilities ko samajh sake
options.C: Taaki woh khud first responder ban sake

questions.explanation: First responder woh hota hai jo incident site par sabse pehle pahunchta hai. Operator ko apni role aur first responders ki role samajhni chahiye taaki effective coordination ho sake.

questions.question: Kisi bhi emergency ke dauran, CCTV operator ka primary goal kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Jaan-maal ki suraksha aur situation ko control karna

questions.explanation: Emergency ke dauran, operator ka primary goal jaan-maal ki suraksha ensure karna, situation ko control karna aur relevant authorities ko sahi information provide karna hai.

questions.question: CCTV footage ko record karne ke liye kis setting ka use kiya jata hai?

options.B: Recording setting

questions.explanation: Recording settings mein video quality, frame rate, recording schedule aur motion detection jaise options hote hain, jo decide karte hain ki footage kaise record hogi.

questions.question: 'Data retention policy' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Data ko hamesha ke liye rakhna
options.B: Data ko kitne samay tak store karna hai, uski policy

questions.explanation: Data retention policy define karti hai ki CCTV footage ko kitne samay tak store kiya jayega, uske baad use delete kar diya jayega.

questions.question: Footage ko 'backup' lena kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf extra copy rakhne ke liye
options.B: Data loss se bachne aur important footage ko secure karne ke liye
options.C: Storage space fill karne ke liye
options.D: System ko slow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Backup lena zaroori hai taaki hardware failure ya accidental deletion ki wajah se important footage ka loss na ho. Isse data secure rehta hai.

questions.question: CCTV footage ko access karne ke liye 'access control' kyon lagaya jata hai?

options.A: Taaki koi bhi use dekh sake
options.B: Unauthorized access rokne aur data privacy maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf system ko complex banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Access control (passwords, user roles) lagane se sirf authorized personnel hi footage ko access kar sakte hain, jisse unauthorized access rukta hai aur data privacy maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: GDPR jaise data privacy laws CCTV operators ke liye kyon relevant hain?

options.B: Personal data ki protection aur legal compliance ke liye
options.C: Sirf Europe mein lagoo hote hain

questions.explanation: GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation) jaise laws personal data ki protection ke liye hain. CCTV footage mein individuals ka data ho sakta hai, isliye in laws ka palan karna legal compliance aur privacy ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Evidence ke roop mein CCTV footage ko export karte samay kya dhyan mein rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Kisi bhi format mein export kar dena
options.B: Original format aur resolution maintain karna, timestamp aur chain of custody document karna

questions.explanation: Evidence ke roop mein footage ko export karte samay, original format aur resolution ko maintain karna chahiye. Timestamp visible ho, aur chain of custody ko properly document karna chahiye taaki uski legal validity bani rahe.

questions.question: CCTV system mein 'overwrite' function ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Nayi footage ko purani footage par record karna
options.B: Footage ko delete karna

questions.explanation: Overwrite function mein jab storage space full ho jata hai, toh system sabse purani footage ko automatically delete karke uski jagah nayi footage record karta hai.

questions.question: Kisi legal request par footage provide karte samay, operator ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Supervisor aur legal team se consult karna chahiye
options.C: Footage ko delete kar dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Legal request par footage provide karne se pehle, operator ko apne supervisor aur legal team se consult karna chahiye taaki sahi procedures follow ho aur koi legal galti na ho.

questions.question: Video compression ka kya fayda hai CCTV recording mein?

options.B: Storage space bachana aur network bandwidth kam karna

questions.explanation: Video compression se footage ka size kam ho jata hai, jisse zyada footage store ki ja sakti hai aur network par data transmit karne ke liye kam bandwidth ki zaroorat padti hai.

questions.question: CCTV footage ko unauthorized access se bachane ke liye kya steps lene chahiye?

options.B: Strong passwords, encryption, aur restricted physical access
options.C: Footage ko bina password ke rakhna
options.D: Sabhi systems ko off kar dena

questions.explanation: Unauthorized access se bachane ke liye strong passwords use karne chahiye, data ko encrypt karna chahiye, aur recording devices tak physical access ko restrict karna chahiye.

questions.question: Kisi incident ke baad, relevant footage ko 'bookmark' karna kyon useful hai?

options.B: Future mein quick access aur reference ke liye
options.C: Footage ko delete karne ke liye
options.D: Footage ko hide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bookmark karne se incident-related footage ko easily identify aur access kiya ja sakta hai, jisse review process faster ho jata hai aur important footage miss nahi hoti.

questions.question: CCTV footage ko 'tampering' se bachana kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Evidence ki authenticity aur legal validity maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Isse footage ka size badhta hai
options.D: Sirf software ko complex banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Tampering se bachana zaroori hai taaki footage ki authenticity bani rahe aur use court mein evidence ke roop mein accept kiya ja sake.

questions.question: CCTV system mein 'storage capacity' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kitne cameras connect ho sakte hain
options.B: Kitni footage record ki ja sakti hai
options.D: Kitne monitors connect ho sakte hain

questions.explanation: Storage capacity ka matlab hai ki DVR/NVR mein kitni footage store ki ja sakti hai, jo HDD ke size par depend karta hai.

questions.question: CCTV footage ko 'securely dispose' karna kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf storage space khali karne ke liye
options.B: Data privacy laws ka palan karne aur sensitive information ko leak hone se rokne ke liye
options.D: Sirf purani files se chhutkara paane ke liye

questions.explanation: Securely dispose karna zaroori hai taaki data privacy laws ka palan ho aur koi bhi sensitive information (jaise individuals ki pehchan) galat haathon mein na pade.

questions.question: CCTV footage ke 'playback' function ka kya use hai?

options.A: Sirf live footage dekhne ke liye
options.B: Recorded footage ko dekhne aur review karne ke liye
options.C: Camera settings change karne ke liye
options.D: Footage ko delete karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Playback function operator ko pehle se record ki gayi footage ko dekhne, review karne aur incidents ko investigate karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: CCTV system mein 'log files' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: System activities, errors aur user actions ko track karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf video data store karne ke liye
options.D: System ko slow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Log files system ki sabhi activities, jaise logins, logouts, errors, aur recording events ko record karte hain, jo troubleshooting aur auditing ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: Agar CCTV monitor par 'No Signal' dikhaye, toh pehla troubleshooting step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Cables connection check karna

questions.explanation: No Signal ki problem aane par, sabse pehle camera se DVR/NVR aur DVR/NVR se monitor tak ke cables (power aur video) ke connections ko check karna chahiye.

questions.question: CCTV cameras ki lens ko regular clean karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf unhe shiny rakhne ke liye
options.B: Clear image quality maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Camera ko off karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Lens par dhool, mitti ya paani ke nishan se image quality kharab ho sakti hai, isliye regular cleaning se clear footage milti hai.

questions.question: Agar recording device (DVR/NVR) kaam nahi kar raha, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Power supply aur connection check karna, phir supervisor ko inform karna
options.C: Khud repair karne ki koshish karna

questions.explanation: Agar recording device kaam nahi kar raha, toh pehle power supply aur connections check karein, phir turant apne supervisor ko inform karein taaki technical team usko theek kar sake.

questions.question: CCTV operator ke liye 'ethical conduct' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf apne fayde ke liye kaam karna
options.B: ईमानदारी, privacy ka samman, aur professional behavior maintain karna

questions.explanation: Ethical conduct ka matlab hai ईमानदारी se kaam karna, individuals ki privacy ka samman karna, aur professional behavior maintain karna, bina kisi bhed-bhav ke.

questions.question: Agar kisi camera ki image quality kharab ho jaye, toh operator ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Issue ko report karna aur camera ki lens check karna

questions.explanation: Kharab image quality ke liye operator ko issue report karna chahiye aur agar possible ho toh camera ki lens ko check karna chahiye ki woh saaf hai ya nahi.

questions.question: CCTV system mein 'firmware updates' kyon important hain?

options.B: Security flaws theek karne aur performance improve karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf naye features add karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Firmware updates security vulnerabilities ko theek karte hain, system ki performance aur stability ko improve karte hain, aur naye features bhi provide kar sakte hain.

questions.question: CCTV operator ko 'teamwork' kyon maintain karna chahiye?

options.B: Effective security operations aur better coordination ke liye
options.C: Apna kaam doosron par dalne ke liye
options.D: Apni zimmedariyon se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: Teamwork se security operations zyada effective hote hain, information sharing behtar hoti hai, aur emergency situations mein coordination achha hota hai.

questions.question: Kisi technical fault ko record karte samay kaun si information deni chahiye?

options.B: Fault ka type, time, affected equipment aur kiye gaye initial steps

questions.explanation: Technical fault report mein fault ka type, kab hua, kaun sa equipment affect hua, aur operator ne kya initial troubleshooting steps liye, ye sab shamil hona chahiye.

questions.question: CCTV operator ke liye 'continuous learning' kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Technology mein updates aur best practices se up-to-date rehne ke liye
options.D: Apna samay barbaad karne ke liye

questions.explanation: CCTV technology aur security practices mein lagatar badlav aate rehte hain, isliye operator ko continuous learning se up-to-date rehna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar CCTV system mein 'network connectivity issue' ho, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Network cables, router/switch aur IP addresses

questions.explanation: Network connectivity issue mein network cables, router/switch ki working condition aur IP addresses ki configuration ko check karna chahiye.

questions.question: CCTV operator ko 'stress management' techniques kyon pata honi chahiye?

options.B: High-pressure situations mein calm rehne aur effective perform karne ke liye
options.D: Apne colleagues ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: CCTV monitoring ek high-stress job ho sakti hai. Stress management techniques operator ko calm rehne aur critical situations mein bhi effective perform karne mein help karti hain.

questions.question: CCTV operator ka duty station (control room) kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Clean, organized aur well-lit

questions.explanation: Ek clean, organized aur well-lit control room operator ki concentration aur efficiency ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Agar koi person CCTV operator ko bribe dene ki koshish kare, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant apne supervisor ko inform karna chahiye aur incident report karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Bribe ki koshish ek serious ethical violation hai. Operator ko turant apne supervisor ko inform karna chahiye aur incident ko detailed mein report karna chahiye.

questions.question: CCTV system ke 'power backup' ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Isse bijli ka bill kam aata hai
options.B: Power cut hone par bhi system ko chalate rehna
options.C: Sirf camera ko off karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Power backup (UPS) power cut hone par bhi CCTV system ko kuch samay tak chalata rehta hai, jisse continuous surveillance maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: CCTV operator ko 'confidentiality agreement' kyon sign karna padta hai?

options.B: Sensitive information ko leak hone se rokne aur organization ke interests protect karne ke liye
options.C: Apni personal details share karne ke liye
options.D: Apne kaam ko public karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Confidentiality agreement operator ko sensitive footage aur information ko leak na karne ke liye legally bind karta hai, jisse organization ke interests aur privacy protect hote hain.

questions.question: Kisi bhi system fault ko report karte samay, operator ko kis tarah ki language use karni chahiye?

options.B: Clear, concise aur professional language

questions.explanation: Fault report mein clear, concise aur professional language use karni chahiye taaki technical team problem ko aasani se samajh sake aur jaldi theek kar sake.
